summary: Good‑sound recording of a fan‑favorite night – Terrapin Station, Women Are Smarter, Crazy Fingers and a rousing Revolution encore shine.
review: The reviewer rates the show five stars, calling it “great” and highlighting the entire first set, the Women Are Smarter opener, Crazy Fingers, Lost Sailor / Saint of Circumstance, Terrapin Station and an electrifying Revolution encore. The sound is described as “good,” with no complaints about drop‑outs or muddiness, indicating a clear and listenable source.

ai_rating.rationale: A single detailed five‑star review praises both the musical performance (standout songs throughout) and the recording quality (good sound), leading to a high overall rating but limited confidence due to only one review.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer mentions “good sound” with no problems noted; no specifics about source (soundboard/audience).

show_quality.setlist_flow: The first set is called “fabulous,” and the second set opener (Women Are Smarter) is described as a treat, with the band delivering high energy throughout and ending on a powerful Revolution encore.

band_member_comments.Jerry: His spoken “Hello” at the end sounded good to the reviewer.
band_member_comments.Bob: Wore a pink Alligator T‑Shirt – noted as classic.
